case_title: ABENEY, ALMA VS YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-16-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-06-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABENEY, ALMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $732.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-18-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-06-2004 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERT MAIL TO RICHARD WEINER - AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS YELLOW CAB CORP. INC. RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-18-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-16-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CASE SETTLED VIA MEDIATION. CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION SET ASIDE JUDGMENT & ENTER DISMISSAL OF OCT-18-2004, GRANTED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION SET ASIDE JUDGMENT & ENTER DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABENEY, ALMA HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-01-2004, DENIED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ABENEY, ALMA AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-18-2004, OFF CALENDAR CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER COURT ORDER
PLFT VOLUNTARILY ENTERED INTO MEDIATED SETTLEMENT OF CASE AND ACCEPTED AND CASHED SETTLEMENT CHECK.
